name: aiXiv
description: A personalized digest from the arXiv

scripts.arxiv:categories: curl -s https://arxiv.org/category_taxonomy | rg -oP '<h4>(.*)<span>' -r '$1' | xargs echo -n | tr ' ' ',' > aiXiv/arxiv/arxiv_categories.csv
scripts.vendor:icons: mkdir -p aiXiv/static/vendor/icons && grep -hoP 'icon\(\".*\"\)' -r aiXiv/templates/ | sed 's/icon(\"\(.*\)\")/\1.svg/' | xargs -I {} cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/{} aiXiv/static/vendor/icons/
scripts.vendor: npm run arxiv:categories && npm run vendor:icons && npm run vendor:htmx && npm run vendor:katex
scripts.compile: npm run vendor && npm run css
